title: Vacancy for Teacher at Arena Animation

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Arena Animation
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
